allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive logging and error handling to unified backfill sync

Major improvements:
- Add error handling to job status update \(prevents state corruption\)
- Add detailed API response logging before parsing \(debug 0-record issues\)
- Log response structure, format detection, and pagination decisions
- Add transform validation to ensure unique key is present
- Implement per-record upsert with retry on batch failure
- Track failed records and errors in sync results
- Add SyncCycleResult.recordsFailed and errors array
- Improve staging insert logging with record count verification
- Log when 0 records returned with context for debugging

This makes it much easier to diagnose why syncs might return 0 records
and provides better error recovery when individual records fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove macOS resource fork files and update gitignore

These ._* files were accidentally tracked and causing git corruption.
Added ._* pattern to .gitignore to prevent future issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
